# VA CSS Library Font Assets

These Source Sans Pro font files are vendored from
`@department-of-veterans-affairs/css-library@0.31.2-rc.1`.

Source tarball:
https://registry.npmjs.org/@department-of-veterans-affairs/css-library/-/css-library-0.31.2-rc.1.tgz

Only the regular and bold `woff2` font files are included because the MVP needs
them for the VA segmented progress bar typography. The full CSS library is not
loaded globally.
